mapper.select: SELECT ff.id,ff.f_number,s.name as f_supplier_id,m.number as f_material_id,ff.fmaterial_name,ff.FFROMQTY,ff.f_to_qty,ff.f_after_price,ff.f_after_tax_price,ff.f_effective_date, ff.f_expiry_date,ff.f_currency_id,f_after_price_coefficient FROM f_fpur_patentry ff INNER JOIN supplier s ON ff.f_supplier_id = s.supplierid INNER JOIN by_material m ON ff.f_material_id = m.k3_id WHERE ff.f_number = #{fNumber}
